profile.title: Profile
profile.headline: <prim>A working site is not enough.</prim> <grad>One that feels right, is.</grad>
profile.line1: I help <accent>companies and founders</accent> earn trust online and turn visits into opportunities with clear, fast interfaces and obsessive attention to detail.
profile.line2: A site that represents you well changes how people see you: <accent>fewer doubts, more inquiries</accent>, and more time for what truly matters.
profile.line3: I design <accent>without friction</accent>, <accent>without generic copy</accent>, and <accent>without confusing surprises</accent>. It is not just shipping: it is your brand feeling clear and confident.
profile.line4: I am passionate about <accent>intentional design</accent> and <accent>aesthetic with purpose</accent> so your business goals show on every screen and you move beyond good enough.
profile.line5: A page can be <accent>functional</accent> and still feel cold. I aim for <accent>memorable</accent> experiences: usability that supports, not replaces, visual craft.
profile.line6: I am known for <accent>attention to detail</accent> in web solutions: clean code, smooth interactions, and a result people remember.

points: Web application development using React JS
Collaboration with backend developers and UX designers
Participation in UX design and project decision-making
Editing and refining prototypes in Figma
Development of responsive interfaces using React, TypeScript, and JavaScript
Version control with Git and GitHub
Application of SOLID principles in personal projects
Website creation with WordPress, Elementor, and Shopify
Collaboration with AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, BlackBox)

skills.title: Technical skills
skills.frontendList: HTML, CSS, SCSS, Tailwind, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js
